articles.title: CorSport: Milan ‘now afraid’ as Allegri shows signs of worry after Sassuolo defeat: “10 months of work”
articles.summary: AC Milan are hanging in the balance between a passable season and another year of underwhelming results. It is a dangerous line to be sitting on. A few months ago, Milan were playing ok football. It was not attractive by any means, but results were there. So, you couldn’t really contest it too much.
